name: Tweet / X Post
noteNameFormat: ✂️🐦 {{selector:[data-testid="User-Name"] span|first}} - {{"Create a unique 3-6 word title summarizing this tweet's main topic. No quotes or punctuation."|safe_name|slice:0,60}}
noteContentFormat:
# `= this.file.name`

## AI Summary

{{"Summarize this post in 2-3 sentences. Focus on the key insight, controversy, or value."|blockquote}}

---

**Author:** `= this.author` (`= this.handle`)
**Posted:** `= this.posted`
**Clipped:** `= this.clipped`
**Link:** [View on X](`= this.source`)

## Content

{{content}}

## My Notes

properties.name: ai_summary
properties.value: {{"In 10 words or less, what is the key point of this post?"}}

properties.name: topics
properties.value: {{"List 2-3 topic tags as a comma-separated list (e.g. tech, AI, programming). No hashtags."}}

properties.name: sentiment
properties.value: {{"Is this post positive, negative, neutral, or controversial? One word."}}
